title: Newgen Software is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Newgen Software is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Newgen Software family as a Full Stack Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
